subject: Bluetooth not pairing with headset
description: User's wireless headset appears in Bluetooth list but pairing fails or headset connects then immediately disconnects.

ts_steps.title: Forget and re-pair
ts_steps.action: Settings → Bluetooth → tap info icon next to the headset → Forget This Device; put headset back into pairing mode and reconnect.

ts_steps.title: Restart Bluetooth stack
ts_steps.action: Toggle Bluetooth off in Settings (not Control Center), wait 10 seconds, toggle back on; also restart the iPhone.

ts_steps.title: Reset network settings
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Transfer or Reset iPhone → Reset → Reset Network Settings (clears all Bluetooth pairings, Wi-Fi passwords, and VPN configs).

internal_information: Bluetooth 5.x profiles can mismatch after firmware updates on either device. Confirm headset firmware is current. Some headsets limit number of saved pairings — clear old entries on the headset side too.
